column1: # PLAN acceptance: "/RSF find sum<Enter>replace total<Enter> → all 'sum'
# in formulas replaced with 'total' in selected range." Our Replace
# variant applies to every match in the range in one go.
# Seed: A1 = @SUM(B1..B3); B1..B3 = 1,2,3 so A1 computes 6.
# /F → Formulas scope; POINT for range. Anchor at A1, extend to B3.
# Back in READY. Pointer was left at the POINT-final cell; navigate
# back to A1 to read its formula from line 1.
